# crates/attractor-agent/src

Implements the core autonomous agent loop for PAS — orchestrates LLM calls, tool execution, conversation fidelity management, loop detection, and child subagent lifecycle.

## Contents

[lib.rs](./lib.rs) Core `AgentSession` loop with `process_input`, `process_single_input`, `build_request`, `execute_tool_calls`. Exports `SessionConfig`, `SessionState`, `Turn`, `ToolResultEntry`, `MAX_TOOL_OUTPUT_LEN = 30_000`. Enforces `max_tool_rounds` (default 200), truncates tool output with char-boundary-safe split using `"\n\n[WARNING: Output truncated. {} characters removed.]"`.

[fidelity.rs](./fidelity.rs) `FidelityMode` enum (`Full`, `Truncate { keep_last: usize }`, `Compact`, `Summary`) and `apply_fidelity<T: Clone>` function for conversation history truncation. Parser accepts "full", "compact", "summary", "truncate:N", "truncate(N)" (N defaults to 50); case-insensitive, defaults to `Full`.

[loop_detection.rs](./loop_detection.rs) `LoopDetector` (sliding `VecDeque` window, `record_and_check`, `reset`) and `SteeringInjector` (static message generators). Call signature format: `"{}:{}"` (tool_name + hash_of_args via `DefaultHasher`). Loop triggers when all window entries match `.all(|s| s == first)`.

[prompt_builder.rs](./prompt_builder.rs) `SystemPromptBuilder` with fluent builder API and priority-based section ordering (base=0, goal=1, node=2, tools=3, docs=4, context=5). `discover_project_docs` checks candidates in order: `".pas/CLAUDE.md"`, `"CLAUDE.md"`, `"README.md"`, `".cursorrules"`, `".github/copilot-instructions.md"`, `"CONTRIBUTING.md"`. Truncation threshold: 10_000 chars.

[subagent.rs](./subagent.rs) `SubagentConfig`, `SubagentStatus` (`Running`, `Completed(String)`, `Failed(String)`), `SubagentManager` with `HashMap<String, SubagentStatus>`. ID format: `"subagent-{N}"` with auto-incrementing counter starting at 0.

[test_utils.rs](./test_utils.rs) `MockEnv` (safe `ExecutionEnvironment` impl), `SequenceMockProvider` (queue-based `ProviderAdapter` impl, `supports_tools() → true`, `context_window_size() → 128_000`), `make_client`, `EchoTool` (name="echo", parameters `{"text": string}`).

## Dependencies

`attractor_llm::{ContentPart, Message, Request, ToolCallResult}`, `attractor_tools::{ExecutionEnvironment, ToolRegistry}`, `attractor_types::AttractorError` (variant `TurnLimitReached`), `uuid::Uuid`, `tracing`, `serde_json`.

## Design Patterns

- Builder pattern: `SystemPromptBuilder` with fluent `with_*` methods returning `Self`
- Sliding window: `LoopDetector` via `VecDeque`
- Counter-based ID generation: `SubagentManager`
- Queue-based mock sequencing: `SequenceMockProvider` with `VecDeque::pop_front`

## Behavioral Contracts

- Truncation template: `"\n\n[WARNING: Output truncated. {} characters removed.]"` with `is_char_boundary` split
- Call signature for loop detection: `"{}:{}"` concatenation of tool_name and JSON args hash
- Steering messages injected as `Turn::Steering` between tool rounds
- Unknown tool returns `is_error: true` with message containing `"Unknown tool"`
- `max_turns == 0` means unlimited turns

## Annex References

[test_utils.annex.sum](./test_utils.annex.sum) — reproduction-critical constants for test utilities.
